prompt.text: Ask the customer for their order number or the product they need to return.
Review the order record and reported defect. Click the advance button to confirm return eligibility.
Check the reported defect against return eligibility rules. Confirm the refund type that applies.
Review the defective product refund policy. Select the correct option for this return.
Confirm the refund details. Add a case note, then click 'Confirm & Initiate Refund'.
Use the checklist below as a guide — respond in your own words.

screenConfigs.title: Order Lookup
screenConfigs.placeholder: Enter order number or product name...

screenConfigs.title: Return Eligibility
screenConfigs.statusText: Return reason: {{failure_code}}. Reported defect: {{defect}}. Merchant has acknowledged the return request — order qualifies for a full refund under the defective product return policy.

screenConfigs.title: Refund Options

policyCards.label: Process
items: Issue prepaid return label — same day
Refund to original payment method — 3 business days
No restocking fee for defective returns

screenConfigs.correctMessage: Correct. Issue a full refund and send a prepaid return shipping label to the customer.

screenConfigs.title: Process Refund
screenConfigs.notePlaceholder: e.g. Customer called re: defective {{product}}, order {{transaction_id}}. Defect: {{defect}}. Full refund of {{amount}} initiated to original {{payment_type}}. Prepaid return label sent. ETA {{estimated_return}}.

screenConfigs.title: Case Resolved — Communicate to Customer

items: Confirm the return request has been approved and state the reason
Confirm the refund amount and the payment method it returns to
Confirm prepaid return label has been sent to their email
Confirm the order number for their records

screenConfigs.resolution: Full refund of {{amount}} initiated to original credit card. Defect confirmed: {{defect}}. Prepaid return label issued. Customer informed.
